title: Slow
description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.
smart_description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn, with an additional [blue]10%[/blue] increase for each subsequent card played this turn.
notes: Slow is a counter that increments each time any card is played. It resets to 0 at the start of the owner's turn. Each stack increases the damage the owner takes from Attacks by 10% (multiplicatively).
